description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade, allowing for ample natural light. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored materials, with some sections in darker tones, and is set on a rectangular grassy plot with a driveway leading to a garage. The property is bordered by a row of dense trees at the rear, providing privacy and a natural backdrop. Adjacent to the main bungalow is a smaller, detached building, likely a garage or guest house, with a pitched roof and a driveway connection. The main entrance is accentuated by a glass facade, and the overall layout is open and spacious, with minimal ornamentation. The clean lines and geometric forms emphasize a contemporary aesthetic, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, set on a grassy lot with a driveway and a detached garage or guest house. The design is minimalist and contemporary, featuring clean lines and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with large glass windows, the driveway, and the detached garage or guest house to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid, light-colored wall with minimal windows and the dense tree line at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, a section with a skylight or glass panel, and the trees providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the geometric forms, flat roof, and the open grassy area in front of the bungalow.
